response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong full-stack and systems engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable depth in production GenAI delivery, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-platform AI systems required for a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role. The resume shows no evidence of 8 years building production AI solutions or customer-facing technical discovery leadership, which are core requirements.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep polyglot engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent ecosystems) with TDD/CI/CD discipline
Proven technical leadership through workshops, talks, and founding an open-source platform
concerns: No explicit production GenAI/LLM delivery experience or RAG/vector database work shown
Missing evidence of designing AI systems on AWS/GCP/Azure at staff scale
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery experience with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Lack of production GenAI and RAG experience
Recent MCP and agentic workflow contributions
No demonstrated enterprise customer-facing delivery role
